headline: Hasbro (HAS) Outperforms Broader Market: What You Need to Know
summary: Hasbro (HAS) concluded the recent trading session at $92.99, signifying a +2.06% move from its prior day's close.

headline: Peachtree Group Advances DST Platform with Savannah Industrial Offering in Key Logistics Corridor
summary: ATLANTA, March 23, 2026--Peachtree Group launched its latest Delaware Statutory Trust offering, PG Savannah Industrial DST.
